---
title: Event-Based Scheduling for Energy-Efficient QoS (eQoS) in Mobile Web Applications
author:
- Yuhao Zhu
- Matthew Halpern
- Vijay Janapa Reddi
categories:
- Show All
- Pre-2018 Work
topics:
- watt_wise_web
url_source: https://horizon-lab.org/pubs/hpca15.pdf
talk_source: https://speakerdeck.com/queeten/event-based-scheduling-for-energy-efficient-quality-of-service-eqos-in-mobile-web-applications
journ: HPCA
year: 2015
contrib: Pre-2018 Work
image: featured.png
pub_number: 10
---
